title: Worn Armor Enchantments 3D
description: A texture pack that displays worn armor enchantments with 3D!
body:
Texture pack that displays combinations of armor enchantments in 3D! Texture pack is inspired by [Visual Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-enchantments) and [Traben's 3D armor models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trabens-3d-armor-models). Also, depending on the level of the protection enchantment (1-3, 4, 5-255), the color of the texture changes.

To use 3D, you should INSTALL [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) 2.1 +. 
For texture combinations install [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or use OptiFine
